Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I did it! I finally met my quota! I found someone else to welcome into our flock![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Oh, wow! Are you interested in joining, too!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}Finally, Paradise is smiling back at me! Yes! Yesss![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}"Scam"? I don't know what you're talking about...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}I'm trying to save these people! They've suffered in this world, just like me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Wh-What are you saying? That I should just abandon these people to their fate!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}I'm trying to save these people! They've suffered in this world, just like me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}Someone as good-looking as you could never understand! You have no idea what people like me have to go through...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}Fine. If you're gonna try and stop me... then... then you and I are through![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Don't follow me around anymore! Only true believers are allowed into Paradise![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm worried about Suemitsu.[n]I better follow him.[n]{f 1 1}
